visual_summary: The image shows a bustling indoor market with various people walking and shopping around fresh produce stands. The large sign above reads 'Marché Jean-Talon' with images of vegetables and fruits displayed. The space features high ceilings with industrial lighting and fans, and multiple stalls offering fresh goods including fruits, vegetables, and other products.
continuity_anchors: industrial ceiling with fans and lights
various market stalls and customers in winter clothing
plausible_actions: people eating or drinking while walking
cinematic_notes: use wide shots to capture market atmosphere
close-ups on fresh produce to highlight colors and textures
capture natural light from windows for soft illumination
follow subjects moving through aisles to convey activity

visual_summary: The image shows a cobblestone street lined with historic commercial buildings featuring stone, brick, and metal facades. Colorful banners and hanging signs hang from the buildings, with a few pedestrians walking along the sidewalk and a single modern car parked on the right side. The sky is overcast, casting a muted light over the scene.
location: Historic urban street with mixed stone and brick buildings
plausible_actions: car pulling out or driving down the street
street vendors setting up or closing stalls
cinematic_notes: Use natural gray overcast light for soft shadows
capture leading lines along cobblestone street for depth
possible tracking shot following pedestrian movement
wide establishing shot to showcase architectural details

visual_summary: The image depicts a pedestrian street in an urban area lined with various shops, many featuring Asian signage and red lantern decorations. Several people are walking or standing, dressed in cold-weather clothing, indicating a chilly day with cloudy skies. Leafless trees line the street, supporting the hanging lanterns and string lights.
location: Urban pedestrian shopping street with Asian influence
mood: cool, bustling but calm urban atmosphere
continuity_anchors: red lanterns hanging from trees and poles
plausible_actions: people window shopping or entering stores
lanterns gently swinging in the breeze
cinematic_notes: use shallow depth of field to highlight individual pedestrians against the busy background
low-angle shots can emphasize the hanging lanterns and overhanging branches
overcast lighting provides soft, diffuse light suitable for even skin tones
tracking shots down the street can capture the flow and rhythm of pedestrian movement

visual_summary: The image depicts a large Ferris wheel situated near a dried-up or low-water canal with a metal pedestrian bridge crossing over it. Several people are seen standing on the bridge and near the base of the Ferris wheel, under a cloudy, overcast sky. The background includes leafless trees and a long industrial-looking building with a rusted upper portion.
location: Urban riverside or waterfront area with a Ferris wheel and pedestrian bridge
mood: overcast and slightly bleak with low activity
continuity_anchors: large white Ferris wheel with colorful center
metal pedestrian bridge with mesh railings
rusted industrial building in the background
plausible_actions: visitors queuing or waiting near the Ferris wheel
cinematic_notes: use wide shots to emphasize scale and emptiness
capture reflections or damp ground near canal
play with overcast light for moody, diffused lighting
close-ups on people interacting near Ferris wheel for contrast with large structures
